name: Trey Gowdy
subject: Checking in Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg for Montana
body:
With only days left until voters hit the polls in Montana (Thursday, May 25th), every action we take now to help Greg Gianforte defeat liberal Democrat Rob Quist will make a difference. |
---
Friend,

I know I reached out to you last week about this race in Montana - but things have escalated and I need your attention once more please.

Democrats in Montana and across the country have not only increased their focus on Montana, but their fundraising efforts as well.

With only days left until voters hit the polls in Montana (Thursday, May 25th), every action we take now to help Greg Gianforte defeat liberal Democrat Rob Quist will make a difference.

**[DONATE>>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42378021:sW1Egi2Nn:m:1:1494336505:A1F70DD5A4AA9879403EB484A738A78A:r)**
Greg needs to raise an additional $150,000 by the end of this week to ensure he can finish the campaign with the best possible reach. These funds will make certain he can fight back against the attacks thrown his way, while also reaching every single voter and ensuring they get out and vote next week.

**[Your donation- no matter the size - will make an impact and could be what pushes Greg to victory.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42378021:sW1Egi2Nn:m:1:1494336505:A1F70DD5A4AA9879403EB484A738A78A:r)**

This election is going to come down to the wire. **Please Friend, let's make history together and help Greg cross the victory line.**

Thanks,

Trey Gowdy
Congressman SC-4

**[DONATE>>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42378021:sW1Egi2Nn:m:1:1494336505:A1F70DD5A4AA9879403EB484A738A78A:r)**

| Paid for by Greg for Montana
---

name: Democrats.org
subject: re: paying more for health care
body:
We must protect affordable health care. **Add your name: call on Senate Republicans to protect affordable health care.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stop-the-Republican-Health-Care-Bill1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170520_dnc_nd&source=em_20170520_dnc_nd")**

---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce9d/4067b0a/280c28b41/7e765828/2772836418/VEsA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170520_dnc_nd&source=em_20170520_dnc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce9d/4067b0a/280c28b41/7e765829/2772836418/VEsB/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170520_dnc_nd&source=em_20170520_dnc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce9d/4067b0a/280c28b41/7e765836/2772836418/VEsO/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170520_dnc_nd&source=em_20170520_dnc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce9d/4067b0a/280c28b41/7e765837/2772836418/VEsP/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170520_dnc_nd&source=em_20170520_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

|

name: Greg Gianforte
subject: I need you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg for Montana
body:
My opponent and his Washington allies just placed a $1 MILLION advertising buy for the last six days of this election! The Left knows exactly how important this race is and will stop at nothing to shut down the conservative movement coming out of Montana! | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42379950:syPzrW2NH:m:1:1494336505:145373B4706F4EDD11748100BB6F4E4A:r)
---
Friend -

I won't lie...we're getting down to the wire here and I need your help!

**Our team has just hours left to buy our final radio, TV, and digital ads for the FINAL days!!!**
My opponent and his Washington allies just placed a **$1 MILLION** advertising buy for the last six days of this election! The Left knows exactly how important this race is and will stop at nothing to shut down the conservative movement coming out of Montana!

**[QUICK DONATE $25>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42379951:syPzrW2NH:m:1:1494336505:145373B4706F4EDD11748100BB6F4E4A:r)**

**[QUICK DONATE $50>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42379952:syPzrW2NH:m:1:1494336505:145373B4706F4EDD11748100BB6F4E4A:r)**

**[QUICK DONATE $100>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42379953:syPzrW2NH:m:1:1494336505:145373B4706F4EDD11748100BB6F4E4A:r)**

**[QUICK DONATE $250>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42379954:syPzrW2NH:m:1:1494336505:145373B4706F4EDD11748100BB6F4E4A:r)**

**[QUICK DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42379950:syPzrW2NH:m:1:1494336505:145373B4706F4EDD11748100BB6F4E4A:r)**

This election has just days left and we can't keep this seat and add to our conservative majority in the House without you!

Our nation's future is resting in the balance based on what happens in Montana. If the Democrats are able to pull off a win in this race, it will fuel their efforts to win many more races moving forward.

Friend, I know that I have asked you for your support before, and I can't tell you how much I appreciate all the support you have given me until now, but we're running up against a major deadline.

**If I'm not on the airwaves until Election Day, my opponent will win!**

**[QUICK DONATE $25>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42379951:syPzrW2NH:m:1:1494336505:145373B4706F4EDD11748100BB6F4E4A:r)**

**[QUICK DONATE $50>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42379952:syPzrW2NH:m:1:1494336505:145373B4706F4EDD11748100BB6F4E4A:r)**

**[QUICK DONATE $100>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42379953:syPzrW2NH:m:1:1494336505:145373B4706F4EDD11748100BB6F4E4A:r)**

**[QUICK DONATE $250>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42379954:syPzrW2NH:m:1:1494336505:145373B4706F4EDD11748100BB6F4E4A:r)**

**[QUICK DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42379950:syPzrW2NH:m:1:1494336505:145373B4706F4EDD11748100BB6F4E4A:r)**

**I know we can finish this race strong and with your help, we will be victorious on election night!**

Thank you for your help in these final days, Friend.

Greg Gianforte

| Paid for by Greg for Montana
---

name: Team Ryan
subject: 1 million signatures
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
Friend,

May is Military Appreciation Month and we want to say _thanks a million_ to our troops.

**Our goal by May 31st is to get 1 million people to say thanks. Will you be one of a million to sign our card?**

At the end of the month we'll send the list of signatures to Jim Mattis to show him our country's gratitude.

If you know anyone who served our country, or if you just want to show your support for our armed services, [**send your thanks today.**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjkwODQ4MTQS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MjYzNzYyOQS2&mt=1&rt=0)** **

Thank you,

Team Ryan

| [1 million signatures >>](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjkwODQ4MTQS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MjYzNzYyOQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc., Prosperity Action, Inc., and the NRCC.

Team Ryan
320 First Street, SE
Washington, D.C. 20003
---

This message reflects the opinions and representations of Team Ryan. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Team Ryan's online community. Click [here](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=29084814&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MjYzNzYyOQS2&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe from Team Ryan.
